category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Uzbekistan market (O'zStandart national certification regime).

title.en: China-to-Uzbekistan LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入乌兹别克斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入烏茲別克：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Uzbekistan's national O'zStandart certification/declaration regime, O'zDSt / IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 / IEC 62471 standards, energy-efficiency programmes, and EMC requirements versus Chinese GB 30255 / GB 7000 standards and CCC certification. Uzbekistan is NOT an EAEU member and operates a national technical-regulation regime.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与乌兹别克斯坦国家 O'zStandart 认证/声明制度、O'zDSt / IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 / IEC 62471 标准、能效计划及电磁兼容要求差距对照，与中国 GB 30255 / GB 7000 标准及 CCC 认证对比。乌兹别克斯坦并非欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员，实行国家技术法规制度。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與烏茲別克國家 O'zStandart 認證/聲明制度、O'zDSt / IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 / IEC 62471 標準、能效計劃及電磁兼容要求差距對照，與中國 GB 30255 / GB 7000 標準及 CCC 認證對比。烏茲別克並非歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員，實行國家技術法規制度。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Uzbekistan technical regulations, O'zStandart certification/declaration requirements, applicable O'zDSt / IEC standards, energy-efficiency programme thresholds, and in-country importer obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement. Uzbekistan is a national (non-EAEU) regime; requirements differ from EAEU EAC marking.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行乌兹别克斯坦技术法规、O'zStandart 认证/声明要求、适用的 O'zDSt / IEC 标准、能效计划阈值及在地进口商义务。乌兹别克斯坦为国家（非欧亚经济联盟）制度，要求与欧亚经济联盟 EAC 标志不同。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行烏茲別克技術法規、O'zStandart 認證/聲明要求、適用的 O'zDSt / IEC 標準、能效計劃閾值及在地進口商義務。烏茲別克為國家（非歐亞經濟聯盟）制度，要求與歐亞經濟聯盟 EAC 標誌不同。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Uzbekistan must obtain O'zStandart conformity certification or declaration of conformity (per the national technical-regulation regime) demonstrating compliance with applicable O'zDSt standards aligned to IEC 60598 (luminaire safety), IEC 62560 (self-ballasted LED lamps), and IEC 62471 (photobiological safety); meet EMC requirements coordinated with the national radio/communications regulator; comply with applicable national energy-efficiency programme requirements for lighting (the local analogue to energy/ecodesign rules, though structured differently from the EU); and work through an in-country importer who typically holds the certification or declaration. Uzbekistan's grid is 220/380 V, 50 Hz — a genuine voltage and frequency match with China's 220/380 V 50 Hz nominal, so design re-rating is generally not required. Uzbekistan has NO horizontal RoHS-type restricted-substance regime (it is not an EAEU member), so the EU/China hazardous-substance restriction model does not map directly — substance restrictions, if any, arise only through specific product or chemical rules. None of these are covered by existing Chinese CCC / GB certification, which is not recognised by O'zStandart.
answer_first.zh: 向乌兹别克斯坦出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：依据国家技术法规制度取得 O'zStandart 合格认证或符合性声明，证明符合与 IEC 60598（灯具安全）、IEC 62560（自镇流 LED 灯）及 IEC 62471（光生物安全）对接的适用 O'zDSt 标准；满足与国家无线电/通信监管机构协调的电磁兼容要求；符合适用的国家照明能效计划要求（当地能效/生态设计类规则，结构与欧盟不同）；并通过通常持有认证或声明的在地进口商开展业务。乌兹别克斯坦电网为 220/380 V、50 Hz——与中国 220/380 V 50 Hz 标称值真正匹配，通常无需重新设计降额。乌兹别克斯坦没有横向 RoHS 类限用物质制度（其非欧亚经济联盟成员），故欧盟/中国有害物质限制模式不能直接对应——物质限制（如有）仅通过特定产品或化学品规则产生。上述均不被现有中国 CCC / GB 认证所涵盖，且 CCC / GB 认证不被 O'zStandart 认可。
answer_first.zht: 向烏茲別克出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：依據國家技術法規制度取得 O'zStandart 合格認證或符合性聲明，證明符合與 IEC 60598（燈具安全）、IEC 62560（自鎮流 LED 燈）及 IEC 62471（光生物安全）對接的適用 O'zDSt 標準；滿足與國家無線電/通信監管機構協調的電磁兼容要求；符合適用的國家照明能效計劃要求（當地能效/生態設計類規則，結構與歐盟不同）；並通過通常持有認證或聲明的在地進口商開展業務。烏茲別克電網為 220/380 V、50 Hz——與中國 220/380 V 50 Hz 標稱值真正匹配，通常無需重新設計降額。烏茲別克沒有橫向 RoHS 類限用物質制度（其非歐亞經濟聯盟成員），故歐盟/中國有害物質限制模式不能直接對應——物質限制（如有）僅通過特定產品或化學品規則產生。上述均不被現有中國 CCC / GB 認證所涵蓋，且 CCC / GB 認證不被 O'zStandart 認可。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Uzbekistan regulator (O'zStandart / Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation), national technical regulation, O'zDSt / IEC standards body reference, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs and non-official secondary sources are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. O'zStandart certification scope, applicable O'zDSt/IEC standard editions, and national energy-efficiency programme thresholds must be re-verified against current Uzbekistan technical regulations on each review cycle. Note Uzbekistan's non-EAEU national status when comparing to EAEU EAC requirements.

q.en: Does Uzbekistan use the EAEU EAC mark for LED luminaires?
q.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦的 LED 灯具是否使用欧亚经济联盟 EAC 标志？
q.zht: 烏茲別克的 LED 燈具是否使用歐亞經濟聯盟 EAC 標誌？

a.en: No. Uzbekistan is NOT a member of the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU) and does not require the EAC mark. It operates a national technical-regulation regime administered by O'zStandart (the Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation), which issues conformity certification or accepts a declaration of conformity against applicable O'zDSt standards (many adopting IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 / IEC 62471). Exporters should not assume EAC documentation prepared for Russia/Kazakhstan satisfies Uzbekistan's regime.
a.zh: 不。乌兹别克斯坦并非欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员，不要求 EAC 标志。它实行由 O'zStandart（乌兹别克技术法规署）管理的国家技术法规制度，依据适用 O'zDSt 标准（多采用 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 / IEC 62471）颁发合格认证或接受符合性声明。出口商不应假定为俄罗斯/哈萨克斯坦准备的 EAC 文件即可满足乌兹别克斯坦的制度。
a.zht: 不。烏茲別克並非歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員，不要求 EAC 標誌。它實行由 O'zStandart（烏茲別克技術法規署）管理的國家技術法規制度，依據適用 O'zDSt 標準（多採用 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 / IEC 62471）頒發合格認證或接受符合性聲明。出口商不應假定為俄羅斯/哈薩克斯坦準備的 EAC 文件即可滿足烏茲別克的制度。

q.en: Does a Chinese LED luminaire need re-design for Uzbekistan's electrical grid?
q.zh: 中国 LED 灯具是否需要为乌兹别克斯坦电网重新设计？
q.zht: 中國 LED 燈具是否需要為烏茲別克電網重新設計？

a.en: Generally no for voltage/frequency. Uzbekistan's grid is 220/380 V, 50 Hz, which matches China's 220/380 V 50 Hz nominal — so the input rating typically does not need re-design. However, market access still requires O'zStandart conformity certification or a declaration of conformity against applicable O'zDSt/IEC standards, EMC clearance via the national radio/communications regulator, and compliance with national energy-efficiency programme requirements — none of which are satisfied by Chinese CCC/GB certification.
a.zh: 就电压/频率而言通常不需要。乌兹别克斯坦电网为 220/380 V、50 Hz，与中国 220/380 V 50 Hz 标称值匹配——故输入额定值通常无需重新设计。但市场准入仍要求依据适用 O'zDSt/IEC 标准取得 O'zStandart 合格认证或符合性声明、通过国家无线电/通信监管机构的电磁兼容许可，以及符合国家能效计划要求——上述均不被中国 CCC/GB 认证所满足。
a.zht: 就電壓/頻率而言通常不需要。烏茲別克電網為 220/380 V、50 Hz，與中國 220/380 V 50 Hz 標稱值匹配——故輸入額定值通常無需重新設計。但市場准入仍要求依據適用 O'zDSt/IEC 標準取得 O'zStandart 合格認證或符合性聲明、通過國家無線電/通信監管機構的電磁兼容許可，以及符合國家能效計劃要求——上述均不被中國 CCC/GB 認證所滿足。
